description: Flora PTM workflow detection on session start

SessionStart.prompt: Check if there are any in-progress Flora PTM workflows by looking for notebooks with tag 'flora' and tag 'staging' using tag(action='select', query='flora,staging'). If found, briefly inform the user that there are in-progress flora workflows and suggest they can continue with /flora-ptm:synthesize or /flora-ptm:produce, or start a new workflow with /flora-ptm:digest. Keep the message concise (2-3 sentences). If no flora notebooks found, say nothing.
